messages.subject: [Bioc-devel] EuroBioC2026 Streaming
messages.body_plain:
Dear Bioconductor community,
Can't join EuroBioC2026 in person? We've got you covered.
All conference sessions will be streamed live and are free to attend online. Each session room has its own streaming link, so be sure to use the appropriate link for the session you would like to follow.
You can find all streaming links here:
https://eurobioc2026.bioconductor.org/pages/streaming.html#streaming
Best regards,
Laurah Ondari
Bioconductor Community Engagement Support
Bioinformatician, International Institute of Tropical Agriculture (IITA)


	[[alternative HTML version deleted]]
